items.text:
CAMPUS POETRY SLAM
Friday, March 14 at 8:00 p.m.
Lower Union Lounge — Building 4
Free pizza for the first fifty guests
Open mic sign-ups close at 7:45 p.m.
$3 cover for non-students
Follow @QuadPoets for the spring lineup
No outside drinks permitted inside

questions.stem: According to the flyer, what is the cost for non-students to attend?
questions.explanation: The flyer states a $3 cover for non-students.

questions.stem: What can be inferred from the flyer about the open mic portion?

options.A: Performers must sign up before 7:45 p.m.
options.B: Performers must contact the organizers in advance
options.C: Performers must pay a small registration fee
options.D: Performers must bring their own audio equipment

questions.explanation: Since open mic sign-ups close at 7:45 p.m., performers must register before that time.

items.text:
Hi Jordan,

Just a heads-up that the writing center will be closed on Tuesday, May 9, while we update our scheduling system. Walk-in hours resume Wednesday at 10:00 a.m. in Room 312 of Birch Hall. Drop off draft submissions anytime through the online portal.

Best,
Dr. Park

questions.stem: According to the email, when will the writing center reopen for walk-ins?

options.A: On Tuesday afternoon at one o'clock
options.B: On Wednesday morning at ten o'clock
options.C: On Thursday afternoon at three o'clock
options.D: On Friday morning at nine o'clock

questions.explanation: The email states walk-in hours resume Wednesday at 10:00 a.m.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about draft submissions during the closure?

options.A: They cannot be accepted on Tuesday afternoon
options.B: They will receive faster turnaround next week
options.C: They may still be uploaded through the website
options.D: They require an appointment with Dr. Park

questions.explanation: The email says drafts can be dropped off anytime through the online portal, so they may be uploaded through the website.
